mapper.select:
SELECT id, rule_name AS "ruleName", rule_type AS "ruleType", discount_value AS "discountValue", min_quantity AS "minQuantity", active, created_time AS "createdAt" FROM pricing_rules
AND rule_type = #{ruleType} AND active = #{active} AND LOWER(rule_name) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{ruleName}, '%'))
ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM price_history AND variant_id = #{variantId}
